verses.1: For the music director. A Psalm of David. How long, LORD? Will You forget me forever? How long will You hide Your face from me?
verses.2: How long am I to feel anxious in my soul, With grief in my heart all the day? How long will my enemy be exalted over me?
verses.3: Consider and answer me, O LORD my God; Enlighten my eyes, or I will sleep the sleep of death,
verses.4: And my enemy will say, “I have overcome him,” And my adversaries will rejoice when I am shaken.
verses.5: But I have trusted in Your faithfulness; My heart shall rejoice in Your salvation.
verses.6: I will sing to the LORD, Because He has looked after me.
